professional_title: Emergency Medicine Physician, Author, Media Personality

topics.topic: Code Red Leadership: Crisis Decisions Under Pressure
topics.description: Drawing from 30+ years of ER decision-making, this session delivers a battlefield-tested framework for making high-stakes leadership calls fast, clearly, and confidently when it matters most.

topics.topic: Flatline to Frontline: Resurrecting Team Resilience
topics.description: Using real ER case studies, this talk shows leaders how to rebuild burned-out, overwhelmed teams and restore peak performance when the pressure never stops.

discussion_points: Code Red Leadership: Crisis Decisions Under Pressure
Flatline to Frontline: Resurrecting Team Resilience
bio: 30+ years frontline ER experience. Published author of Never Let Them See You Sweat. Extensive media presence across TV, print, and digital.
